---
title: 🥁
number-sections: true
number-depth: 3
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, assets/custom.scss]
    logo: assets/9B4FA171-F58E-4E6D-BD30-F65410A78D3F.jpeg
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: assets/9B4FA171-F58E-4E6D-BD30-F65410A78D3F 2.jpeg
  data-background-size: cover
  data-background-opacity: "0.5"
---

## 기초

![](fig/figure01.png){fig-align=center}

---

### Stick control & Stroke

![](fig/figure02.png){fig-align=center}

---

### Rudiments

![](fig/figure03.png){fig-align=center}

---

### Rhythm

![](fig/figure04.png){fig-align=center}

---

### Groove & Fill

![](fig/figure05.png){fig-align=center}

---

### Song

![](fig/figure06.png){fig-align=center}

## Daily Practice

### 4 to 8 turnaround

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**GOAL: BPM 100**
:::

![](fig/daypra01.png){fig-align=center}
